title: Nursery Rhyme. CLXXXIV. Riddles.
content:
[A thorn.]

        I went to the wood and got it,
        I sat me down and looked at it;
        The more I looked at it the less I liked it,
        And I brought it home because I couldn't help it.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. CLXXXIV. Riddles."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
